untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cointegration analysis and spread calculation between paired assets, which are not available in the allowed indicators list. Cointegration testing, spread construction, and Z-score thresholds for mean reversion cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, and standard technical indicators. A proper implementation requires statistical pair analysis (ADF test, hedge ratio calculation, spread normalization).
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using SMA crossover as a crude proxy for mean reversion, but this does NOT capture the true cointegration logic. The original signal specifically requires: (1) cointegration identification between two assets, (2) spread calculation, (3) stationarity testing, and (4) Z-score-based entry/exit thresholds. None of these can be reliably implemented with the available indicator set.
